meta.northy_message: Wednesday cracked the systems-mode trap — but didn't break it. Canyon renewal call + Follett reconnection = real revenue activity, the first in 17 days. But $3K retention isn't new revenue. 39 days. Build on this Thursday, don't retreat.

act_now.title: Systems-Mode Trap DAY 17 — Crack But Not Broken
act_now.detail: Wednesday: Canyon ISD renewal call (48 min, $3K) + Follett reconnection email. First observable revenue activity in 17 days. But $3K retention deal. Not new revenue. 39 days to Sept 1. Cash $97.7K.
act_now.action: Thursday: three revenue actions before noon. Call Jodi. Call one superintendent. Call one renewal district. Build on momentum.

act_now.title: Canyon ISD Pipeline Zombie — $10,598 → $3,000
act_now.detail: Canyon renewal closed at $3K, down from $10,598 in HubSpot. 'Testing' flag was correct. 51 districts still in 'To Be Renewed' at full sticker — how many are zombies?
act_now.action: Zig audit 51 'To Be Renewed' districts against budget deficit, IMTA position, personnel stability, last engagement. Re-price zombies.

act_now.title: Patrick Equity Cliff OVERDUE +7 — 32 Days Lag
act_now.detail: July 15 deadline passed. 32 days total. The Crucial Conversations framework: long lag = rotting. The conversation isn't getting easier.
act_now.action: Call Patrick before Friday. Use STATE. 'I owe you a conversation about your equity. Can we talk this week?'

act_now.title: Garland $247K — 10 Days No Movement Since Jodi Meeting
act_now.detail: Jodi meeting July 13. $247K combined (Garland $140K + CFB $107K) is single largest unpulled lever. 10 days no follow-up.
act_now.action: Text Jodi Thursday: 'Following up on our July 13 conversation — when can we schedule the next step?'

act_now.title: Revenue Target Contradiction DAY 26 — Zig at $1.5M
act_now.detail: Zig optimizing for $1.5M. Real target: $1M by Sept 1. 26 days uncorrected. Every day Zig works the wrong number.
act_now.action: Tell Zig: 'Target is $1M by Sept 1. Recompute.' Ten seconds.

intel.title: AI-Native SDLC Security — Single-Purpose Agent Identities
intel.pattern: Single-purpose agent identities, minimum permissions, agent-to-agent Slack comms as norm, every action logged to SIEM. Claude authors 80% of merged code.
intel.applies_to: Founding trio mutual watch protocol. Every agent should have a dedicated identity with minimum permissions for its job.

intel.title: Context Engineering Is the Unlock — Not Bigger Windows
intel.pattern: The unlock isn't bigger context windows — it's context engineering: deciding WHICH three books to put on the desk. GBrain at 27K stars, 146K pages.
intel.applies_to: Hermes skill loading + G-Brain volunteer_context. Audit which pages are retrieved per task.
